name: Ibrahim ibn Malik al-Ashtar
title: The Valiant Avenger
shortDescription: A brave commander who joined Mukhtar al-Thaqafi and killed Ubaydullah ibn Ziyad in the Battle of Khazir.
fullStory: Ibrahim, the son of Malik al-Ashtar (the loyal companion of Imam Ali), was a fearless warrior and an outstanding commander. After Mukhtar al-Thaqafi's uprising to avenge Imam Hussain (AS), Ibrahim joined him and was appointed chief commander of his army. His greatest achievement occurred in the Battle of Khazir, where he crushed the massive Syrian army and personally killed Ubaydullah ibn Ziyad, Husayn ibn Numayr, and Shurahbil ibn Dhi'l-Kala (the main criminals of Karbala).
quoteArabic: اللهم إنك تعلم أنا خرجنا غضباً لابن بنت نبيك.
quote: O Allah! You know that we have risen to avenge the blood of the son of Your Prophet's daughter.
